# Nonprofit research packet for `gecon.ai`

This folder is organized by workstream.

## Start here

- Checklist: [`CHECKLIST_501c3_CA.md`](/documents/CHECKLIST_501c3_CA.qmd)

## Federal / IRS research

- [`irs/01_federal_formation_and_501c3.md`](/documents/irs/01_federal_formation_and_501c3.qmd)

## California research

- [`state/01_california_formation.md`](/documents/state/01_california_formation.qmd)
- [`state/02_california_ongoing_compliance.md`](/documents/state/02_california_ongoing_compliance.qmd)

## Bylaws / drafting research

- [`bylaws/01_bylaws_requirements.md`](/documents/bylaws/01_bylaws_requirements.qmd)
- [`bylaws/02_gecon_ai_clause_drafts.md`](/documents/bylaws/02_gecon_ai_clause_drafts.qmd)

## Other research

- [`other/01_operational_notes.md`](/documents/other/01_operational_notes.qmd)
- [`other/02_regulatory_notes.md`](/documents/other/02_regulatory_notes.qmd)

## Submission drafts

- [`submissions/state/03_draft_articles_ca_501c3.md`](/submissions/state/03_draft_articles_ca_501c3.qmd)
- [`submissions/state/04_incorporator_statement.md`](/submissions/state/04_incorporator_statement.qmd)
- [`submissions/state/05_draft_initial_board_consent.md`](/submissions/state/05_draft_initial_board_consent.qmd)
- [`submissions/state/06_si100_information_sheet.md`](/submissions/state/06_si100_information_sheet.qmd)
- [`submissions/state/07_attorney_general_initial_registration_packet.md`](/submissions/state/07_attorney_general_initial_registration_packet.qmd)
- [`submissions/bylaws/03_draft_bylaws.md`](/submissions/bylaws/03_draft_bylaws.qmd)
- [`submissions/bylaws/04_conflict_of_interest_policy.md`](/submissions/bylaws/04_conflict_of_interest_policy.qmd)
- [`submissions/bylaws/05_compensation_review_policy.md`](/submissions/bylaws/05_compensation_review_policy.qmd)
- [`submissions/irs/02_form_1023_activity_narrative.md`](/submissions/irs/02_form_1023_activity_narrative.qmd)
- [`submissions/irs/03_form_1023_officers_directors_template.md`](/submissions/irs/03_form_1023_officers_directors_template.qmd)
- [`submissions/irs/04_form_1023_budget_template.md`](/submissions/irs/04_form_1023_budget_template.qmd)
- [`submissions/other/03_donation_acknowledgment_template.md`](/submissions/other/03_donation_acknowledgment_template.qmd)

## What I used from adjacent projects

I reviewed the `lab-website` project one directory up and used its public-facing mission language as context for the recommended 501(c)(3) framing:

- AI economics research
- generative AI as both subject and tool of research
- public education / collaboration / dissemination
